title: Linai and the Sunny Sea
description: Linai drifts over sparkling waves, meets a heavenly angel, then floats up to a cheerful balloon.

acts.approachText: Linai is drifting lazily over the glittering sea, her body a soft translucent blue-green, vapor trails fanning out behind her like a gentle wake. Suddenly a radiant angel hovers into view just above the wave crests, wings beating in slow, luminous arcs. Linai freezes mid-drift, her eyes widening into enormous soft circles. Her internal patterns simplify into tiny swirling sparkles — she is struck by the beauty of it. She drifts a few degrees closer, then stops, unsure whether to approach or simply admire. The angel tilts its head, curious about this glowing cloud creature. Linai pulses a warm golden hue, then dims back to blue-green, flustered. She tries drifting in a slow circle around the angel, trailing a ribbon of vapor as a kind of greeting. The angel watches, amused but unmoving. Linai then expands her body wide and lets her glow brighten to full intensity — a big, unmistakable hello. The angel smiles but still waits, as though expecting something more specific. Linai deflates slightly, turns both eyes toward the viewer with a flat, patient stare, and waits for guidance.

choices.label: Pulse a gentle rainbow glow
choices.outcomeText: Linai draws her body inward, concentrates, and then radiates a slow pulse of soft rainbow light outward in rings — rose, gold, sky-blue, violet — each ring expanding across the wave tops before fading. The angel's wings catch the colors and scatter them like prisms. The angel laughs — a silent, luminous laugh — and reaches out a wing tip to touch Linai's edge. Where they meet, a burst of warm sparkles erupts and drifts down onto the sea like tiny stars. Linai's internal patterns bloom into full hearts and spirals. She rises a little higher than necessary, buoyant with delight, and the two drift side by side for a warm, unhurried moment before the angel ascends and Linai floats onward, glowing steadily.

choices.label: Surge upward past the angel
choices.outcomeText: Linai decides boldness is the answer and surges straight upward at speed, vapor trails snapping behind her. She overshoots the angel entirely, rockets too high, and hangs in the bright sky for a beat — eyes wide, trails pointing straight down. Then gravity's cousin, buoyancy, reasserts itself and she drifts back down in a slow, wobbly spiral. She settles back to wave height, slightly flattened, and the angel is still right there, wings folded, wearing an expression of polite bewilderment. Linai's glow flickers a sheepish pink. She tries again.

acts.approachText: Riding the warm glow of her angel encounter, Linai drifts further along the sea when a large, cheerful red-and-yellow balloon bobs into her path, its string trailing down into the waves below. It sways gently in the sea breeze, round and bright and completely blocking the most pleasant floating lane. Linai tilts her body to examine it. Her eyes narrow thoughtfully. She nudges forward and her leading edge makes contact — the balloon wobbles and bobs back, and Linai rebounds with a soft pulse, eyes wide. She tries again, pressing more firmly; the balloon squashes slightly against her, then springs back and sends her drifting backward a few feet. She hovers, trails drooping with mild exasperation. She then drifts upward to peek over the top of the balloon — it is very round and very large. She drifts downward to check beneath — the string disappears into the waves. She turns both eyes to the viewer, blinks once, and waits.

choices.label: Phase through the balloon gently
choices.outcomeText: Linai takes a slow breath — her body contracts slightly, her glow dims to a calm, focused silver-white — and she begins to dissolve her leading edge into a fine mist. She phases forward through the balloon's skin in a long, graceful drift, her translucent form visible for a moment inside the balloon like a ghost in a lantern, casting a warm glow through the red-and-yellow rubber. Then she emerges cleanly on the other side, re-forms with a satisfying pulse, and her internal patterns burst into full sparkles. The balloon bobs happily behind her, unharmed and perhaps a little more luminous than before. Linai rises higher, trails lifting with easy buoyancy, and floats onward over the bright sea — content, glowing, and entirely herself.

choices.label: Drift under the string
choices.outcomeText: Linai decides the string is the key and swoops downward toward the wave surface to slip beneath it. She dips low — too low — and her vapor trails skim the wave tops, absorbing a fine spray of saltwater. She shifts color abruptly to a startled teal-green, sputters a cloud of tiny droplets, and bobs back upward. The string, meanwhile, has tangled lightly in her trailing vapor. She spins slowly in place, unwinding herself with a series of small pulses, eyes flat and patient. After a beat she is free, slightly damp-looking, and back where she started. The balloon bobs cheerfully, indifferent. Linai shakes herself, re-centers, and tries something else.
